name: svalkus
description: HTML5 Canvas game packaged for web and Android.

scripts.android:add: npm run build:web && npx cap add android
scripts.android:sync: npm run build:web && npx cap sync android
scripts.android:build:debug: npm run android:sync && cd android && JAVA_HOME=/opt/homebrew/opt/openjdk@21 ANDROID_HOME=/opt/homebrew/share/android-commandlinetools ./gradlew assembleDebug
